# NotificationSeverity <kbd>Enum</kbd>

> Severity level of a notification.
> 
> Determines visual treatment and default delivery behavior.
> CRITICAL notifications bypass "Do Not Disturb" settings.

**Defined in:** `enums.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>enums.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
enum NotificationSeverity {
    INFO
    WARNING
    CRITICAL
}
```

</details>

<a id="values"></a>

## 🏷️ Values

> Possible values for this enumeration.

| Value | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `INFO` | Informational. No action required. |
| `WARNING` | Requires attention but is not urgent. |
| `CRITICAL` | Requires immediate action. Bypasses DND settings. |
